text: 1akim:4666 - Abii Bakr b. Ishag > Muhammad b. Ts4 b. al- sakan al-Wasit1 > Shihab b. ‘Abbad > Muhammad b. Bishr > I-Hasan b. Hay > Abii Rabiah al-Ayadi > al-Hasan > Anas > yal Rasil [Machine] The Messenger of Allah ££ said, "Paradise ongs for three: Ali, Al-Ammar, and Salman." 2 - Sound (Dhahabi)
